_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Participate in risk assessment and authorization per Risk Management Framework processes.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.617), DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.590).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.518). Shared vocabulary: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [assessment, authorization, participate, per, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.890, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Participate in risk assessment and authorization per Risk Management Framework p" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.634 > STS 0.518 (gap +0.115). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [framework, management, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.9%. Shared tokens: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only: [assessment, authorization, participate, per, processes]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].

signals.detail: STS 0.518 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
